title: SpEx - MC Civilization Experiment
description: Unofficial modpack for the Civilization Specialization Experiment by ShotRush and CivLabs
body:
![CivLabs title when you join the server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tOtFEyiq/images/7534bf6a49c81cdc8e790aec6948c436b143769f.jpeg)

_Unofficial modpack for the Civilization Specialization Experiment by ShotRush and CivLabs_

<sup>If you are part of the moderation team of the project and want me to remove a mod please contact me on Discord!</sup>

---

### TLDR of Noteworthy Features:
- See easily who is talking thanks to [Talkin Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/talkingheads)
- Change someones volume on the fly thanks to [VolumeScroll](https://modrinth.com/mod/volumescroll)
- Open the /class and /recipes interfaces easily by pressing the C and R keys respectively thanks to [BindCommands](https://modrinth.com/mod/bindcommands)
- Sort chest on an instant using [Client Sort](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientsort)
- See very far away thanks to [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) and [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)
- Helpful tooltips based on the Wifi provided by [SpEx Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/project/vvvveYgC)
- Custom panoramas provided by [Vistas](https://modrinth.com/project/itzZXRxq) and [SpEx Panoramas](https://modrinth.com/project/31pu7UWy)
- Added [Pick Up Notifier](https://modrinth.com/mod/pick-up-notifier) to show items you pick up
- Added [Chat Notify](https://modrinth.com/project/Iudurxl8) so you can get a little sound when someone mentions you!
- and much more... Give it a try you wont regret it!
 
---

**SpEx** is a lightweight modpack focused on **client performance**, originally based around Simply Optimized with additions from the whitelist of the Civilization Specialization Experiment run by CivLabs.

Its premise is simple, to be a **small QoL modpack** based around vanilla intended to be used for large multiplayer servers, featuring mods like Sodium and Lithium to heavily boost performance.
Other features include 3D Player Skins, Bobby, and Shaders to enhance the graphics. A preconfigured Bindcommands is also included with commands from the server already binded.

This modpack is intended for large civilization servers but can work fine as a base for singleplayer modding or use on other popular servers.
